steps.title: Use the table value
steps.content: The sentence needs the total area of Pueblo de Cochiti from the table. It also needs a value that supports the statement that most Pueblo tribal nations are much smaller than the Pueblo of Laguna, which covers nearly 800 square miles.

steps.title: Select the matching area
steps.content: Choice A gives a value not identified for Pueblo de Cochiti. Choice B is much closer to Laguna's area and does not fit the example as well. Choice D gives a different small value from the table. The table value for Pueblo de Cochiti is 82.1 square miles. The answer is C.
